rationale: Small Llama-style model; RMSNorm and no bias match, but RoPE, SwiGLU and GQA require RTL changes.
Newer Qwen small model; no attention bias in config and useful GQA ratio, but still needs RoPE/SwiGLU/GQA.
Strong small eviction-research candidate; Qwen2 uses GQA, RoPE, SwiGLU and attention bias.
Closest small public Llama-like baseline to VEDA, but large for RTL and uses GQA/SwiGLU/RoPE.
Small and open; GPT-NeoX parallel residual, GELU and partial RoPE differ from RTL.
ReLU, Pre-LN, MHA, 4D FFN; but LayerNorm, learned positions and bias require hardware or wrapper changes.
Very well supported but old GPT-2 LayerNorm/GELU/bias/learned-position stack.
Smallest trained checkpoint; architecture uses GPT-Neo LayerNorm, GELU and local attention.
VEDA reference family, but gated and too large for complete RTL simulation.
